title: ctenitis alteroblumei
intro: Ctenitis alteroblumei is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae, native to the tropical and subtropical regions of the Pacific Islands. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Ctenitis alteroblumei include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can aid in reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating wounds. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made by infusing its leaves in hot water, creating a tea that can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
